record.field: <data> <!-- Replace first appointment_date with [date + healthprof]. Original date consumed by replace — no duplicate. --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date']" position="replace"> <field name="appointment_date" string="Date" widget="date"/> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> </xpath> <!-- Remove original healthprof from its old position (near end) --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/> </data>
